text: Entering this bright, modern space, I am struck by the careful curation of ideas and technology. The glass, the screens, the bold "R+D" signage—they all evoke an atmosphere of innovation and curiosity. I feel both intrigue and anticipation, as if I am a guest on the edge of discovery, surrounded by the ongoing dialogue between humanity and our inventions. There is an underlying hum of purpose, but also a subtle invitation to question and reflect.
